case_title: HUSSEIN HASSAN ELDIBANI VS. ABBAS AL SHADUD DBA GALAXEY PIZZA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELDIBANI, HUSSEIN HASSAN SERVED JUN-18-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABBAS AL SHADDUD DBA GALAXCY PIZZA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HUSSEIN ELDIBANI'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 7, 2012 BECAUSE THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM AUGUST 31. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITON AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-19-2013 VACATED. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED ON 2/4/13. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Set For Trial On Aug-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF HUSSEIN ELDIBANI's DEMURRER TO DEFENDANTS ABBAS AL SHADUD D/B/A GALAXCY PIZZA; ABBAS AL SHADUD D/B/A DIAMOND SANDWICHES, ABBAS AL SHADUD AS AN INDIVIDUAL'S ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. The demurrer serves no useful purpose. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Continued To Sep-07-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF HUSSEIN ELDIBANI'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to September 7, 2012 because the court does not have courtesy copies of the moving papers. Plaintiff must provide courtesy copies of the moving papers with a cover letter stating the new hearing date to department 302 no later than 4pm August 31. The court has courtesy copies of the oppositon and reply papers. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
